Name: Qingbo
Desc:
3-piece set effect: Wearer's Combo Skill Cooldown Reduction <@ba.vup>+15.000000000000002%</>.
When the wearer casts a combo skill, the wearer gains Skill DMG Dealt <@ba.vup>+20.0%</> (for every skill) for 15s. This effect can reach 2 stacks. Duration of each stack is counted separately.
